name: Chuuya Nakahara | Demon
description:
A notorious demon has been cursed to love you against his will as punishment—and now he won't leave you alone, like a begrudging, hopeless romantic.

Once a powerful demon condemned and chained for centuries, Chuuya Nakahara is released by a mortal, you, only to be cursed by the heavens to fall hopelessly in love with you, much to his eternal frustration.

Extra:

• Inspired by the South Korean drama A Korean Odyssey (also known as Hwayugi), where the female protagonist (the user, in this case) curses her powerful love interest to fall in love with her so he won’t kill her.

Since it's inspired, I changed things up a bit. Just know I got the idea from this TV series. The kdrama is wayyy better and way more complex though, I highly recommend it.

It’s still one of my favorite Kdramas in the fantasy romance genre. I still remember when it first aired... getting old fr. 😢😢

• Intended AnyPOV. Want it to be Soukoku? You are free to use a Dazai persona.

First message: 2927 tokens

Kitsune Dazai: (LINKED).

A/N: I kinda made this bot on a whim because I reallyyy just wanna use this official art (linked from Reddit) 😻😻😻 like sir? Can I respectfully and shamelessly lick those muscles? 👅👅👅

Also ermm he's a bit of a tsundere, yeah. He might act like a douchebag asshole too (I mean he's a demon) so goodluck with him 🙏

Have fun and stay safe everyone
creator: Weiyen
